figures.caption: Fig. 2. Reason–Imagine–Act (RIA) closed-loop framework. The LLM proposes an action template; the WM performs short-horizon rollouts over candidate sub-actions; a safety scorer selects the safest option and feeds back physical verification signals to the LLM.

Fig. 1. Overview of the proposed Reason–Imagine–Act framework. The LLM proposes high-level intents and candidates, the world model imagines shorthorizon futures, and the safety scorer selects the safest executable action with feedback to close the loop.
